def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    incr = Array.new(n, 1)
    (1..n-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            incr[i] = incr[i-1] + 1
        end
    end

    decr_right = Array.new(n, 1)
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            decr_right[i] = decr_right[i+1] + 1
        end
    end

    incr_right = Array.new(n, 1)
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            incr_right[i] = incr_right[i+1] + 1
        end
    end

    prefix = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix[i+1] = prefix[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    (0..n-1).each do |p|
        if incr[p] >= 2 && decr_right[p] >= 2
            q = p + decr_right[p] - 1
            if incr_right[q] >= 2
                r = q + incr_right[q] - 1
                l = p - incr[p] + 1
                current_sum = prefix[r+1] - prefix[l]
                max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
            end
        end
    end

    max_sum
end

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    incr = Array.new(n, 1)
    (1..n-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            incr[i] = incr[i-1] + 1
        end
    end

    decr_right = Array.new(n, 1)
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            decr_right[i] = decr_right[i+1] + 1
        end
    end

    incr_right = Array.new(n, 1)
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            incr_right[i] = incr_right[i+1] + 1
        end
    end

    prefix = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix[i+1] = prefix[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    (0..n-1).each do |p|
        if incr[p] >= 2 && decr_right[p] >= 2
            q = p + decr_right[p] - 1
            if incr_right[q] >= 2
                r = q + incr_right[q] - 1
                l = p - incr[p] + 1
                current_sum = prefix[r+1] - prefix[l]
                max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
            end
        end
    end

    max_sum
end

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    incr = Array.new(n, 1)
    (1..n-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            incr[i] = incr[i-1] + 1
        end
    end

    decr_right = Array.new(n, 1)
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            decr_right[i] = decr_right[i+1] + 1
        end
    end

    incr_right = Array.new(n, 1)
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            incr_right[i] = incr_right[i+1] + 1
        end
    end

    prefix = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix[i+1] = prefix[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    (0..n-1).each do |p|
        if incr[p] >= 2 && decr_right[p] >= 2
            q = p + decr_right[p] - 1
            if incr_right[q] >= 2
                r = q + incr_right[q] - 1
                l = p - incr[p] + 1
                current_sum = prefix[r+1] - prefix[l]
                max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
            end
        end
    end

    max_sum
